text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf and her fellow students are staying at a seaside
facility for the summer training camp.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Phew... That's it for today's training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The camp has only just begun, so better safe than sorry. I should go
for a cooldown walk.
choice_data_list: How about we go explore a bit, then?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you certainly make a tempting offer. Very well then—I could
use the company.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The mind needs breaks too, after all. There should be a seaside cafe
nearby, if you're feeling as peckish as I am.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We wrap up Symboli Rudolf's training and head for lunch. Then, later
that evening...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh, good evening, Trainer. Working in your free time? You're
certainly dedicated.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I was conducting a light patrol of the camp. ...Perhaps I have too
much time on my hands.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Although, I suppose it's a good thing that there are no issues to
demand my attention...
Aaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Wh-what was that scream?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Let's go! I pray nothing is wrong!
Aaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The screams are coming from more than one direction! What in the
world is going on?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... That last scream came from somewhere around here...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I don't understand. I'm sure I heard someone here just moments ago...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Please... be safe, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Bwaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Whoa! P-president?! I'm so sorry—I thought you were a
classmate!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
We're so, so, so sorry! A bunch of us were goofing off, trying to scare
each other. I don't even know where to start apologizing...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You were scaring each other? ...So, no one is hurt or in danger?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: No...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! What a relief! If nothing else, you certainly did a great job of spooking me!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: U-um... President Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha... Ah, it's nothing. I'm just happy you're making the most of
your time together.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: My apologies for interrupting your game. Please, carry on.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm? Is something the matter? You all seem rather lost for words...
choice_data_list: Maybe they thought they were in for a scolding.
Maybe they thought they were in for a scolding.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A scolding? But they've done nothing wrong. This is their own free
time—why shouldn't they use it as they see fit?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We're all students. There's more to our lives than racing and training,
and the times we spend together will serve as a vital springboard for
the future.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, each day of our lives comes but once. During a special event
like this camp, who wouldn't want to make fun memories to look back
on?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Even I... Haha. Yes, I would be lying if I were to claim I didn't enjoy
these little everyday moments.
choice_data_list: Then why not ask if you can join them?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. Now, now. You know I can't impose on them like that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Pay my trainer's words no mind, everyone. We've a long camp ahead
of us, so you should take this opportunity to recharge—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: U-um! President Rudolf?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: If it's all right with you... Would you, you know, care to join us?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! Only if it's no trouble, though!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Trouble? Perish the thought. Hehe... I would be delighted to join you!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Alpha Team, report.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am! Preparations are complete, and everyone's in position!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Excellent. Next, Bravo Team, make your way to the staging area. Stay
alert for any lurking dangers.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Once you locate an ideal spot, hide yourselves. You know what to do
after that, correct?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Yep! We jump out and give the others a good scare!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Superb. Best of luck, and let's scare up some good fun.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Roger that!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Is that really so surprising? I want this spook-off to be a runaway
success.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It would be a shame if we didn't put forth our best effort for the
participants. A team effort will maximize the scare factor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Haha... You know, you're right. I've never had this much fun at a
training camp before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus begins an event that will go down in history as the camp's most
thrilling spook-off.
